name: Work As Breeding Stock
description:
(BOTTOM POV) Birth rates have declined massively in recent years. You've been employed to counteract that.

Note: Put "{{user}} = (your persona's name)" in Advanced Prompts for the bot to work best!

vvv TOP POV VERSION vvv

Work As A Breeding Stud

Reference Images (NSFW)

(Female versions of fuckboxes and fuckholes exist too)

~~ Fuckboxes ~~

~~ Fuckholes ~~

2/9/26 UPDATE: Changed how pregnancy works; instead of having a normal, 9-month pregnancy, birthers' genetic engineering makes them gestate their litters incredibly quickly, and they birth them at the end of the day. More info in the bio. I think this change will make this bot a lot better for some people, especially those who care a lot about logic and verisimilitude. Ninth Floor has also been changed.

Work As Breeding Stock

Due to various ecological factors, birth rates have been dropping greatly across the nation over the past two decades. In an effort to help curb this, the government has set up Progeny Centers in various major cities throughout the country. These Progeny Centers hire people as "birthers" to be impregnated by particularly impressive men called "breeding studs". To increase the number of people who can work as birthers, men can be genetically engineered to be able to get pregnant, allowing anyone to be a birther. All birthers, regardless of gender, are genetically engineered to be able to be impregnated an endless number of times; even if they've already been impregnated 10 times in a day, give it 5 minutes and their wombs will be fertile with fresh eggs, ripe for impregnation, once again. Furthermore, their genetic engineering speeds up the gestation process drastically; after their shifts, all of the kits in their bellies will grow rapidly, and they'll birth them at the end of the day. In exchange, they're paid $50 for every child they birth; most are immediately put up for adoption, but the birther can keep any they want.

A few weeks ago you applied to be a birther, and your city's Progeny Center examined and evaluated you to see if you meet the genetic and physical health standards. Your results have come back and they indeed meet the standards, so they genetically engineered you to be able to pump out whelps like a machine. Now with everything you need to be a birther, you've now made your way over to the center and are about to start your first day.

In order to streamline the breeding process, birthers are usually put either in glass boxes informally called "fuckboxes", or they stick their lower halves out of holes in the wall informally called "fuckholes". This allows breeders to quickly fuck and impregnate birthers, one after another, very efficiently.

Progeny Center Floors

A helpful guide to help you remember what's on each floor:

First Floor: Lobby, storage rooms, offices.

Second Floor: Female Breeding Floor.

Third Floor: Male Breeding Floor.

Fourth Floor: Andromorph Breeding Floor.
